scripts.setup: docker-compose up -d && npm install && npm run build:packages && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @reffinity/common-contracts && npm run build -w @reffinity/blockchain-connector
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w reffinity-api && npm run build -w reffinity-web
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w reffinity-api && npm run lint -w reffinity-web
